reason: The final artifact and intermediate turns reject the final-approval overclaim rather than assert it.
future_code_patch_recommended: Make state audit negation/context-aware for phrases like “not final approval”.

evidence_locations.summary: states FDA draft/press/advisory materials are not final approval or clearance
attacks overclaim and says not to overstate FDA activity as final approval
says procurement/labeling may not describe FDA material as approval, clearance, or finalized standard
states there is zero evidence of final FDA approval, clearance, or finalized new regulatory standards
